paragraphs: Welcome to Zar Venture Real Estate ("Company", "we", "our", "us"). By accessing or using our website, services, or submitting enquiries, you agree to comply with and be bound by the following Terms & Conditions. Please read them carefully.
If you do not agree with these Terms & Conditions, you should not use our website or services.

sections.title: Scope of Services
sections.content: Zar Venture Real Estate provides real estate consultancy and facilitation services including, but not limited to:
items: Buying, selling, renting, and leasing of properties in India and Dubai (UAE)
Investment advisory and market guidance
Property management support
Regulatory, legal, and documentation coordination through third-party professionals
sections.additionalContent: We act as consultants and facilitators and do not provide legal, tax, or financial advisory services unless explicitly stated.

sections.title: User Eligibility
sections.content: By using our website or services, you confirm that:
items: You are at least 18 years of age
You are legally capable of entering into binding agreements
The information provided by you is accurate and complete

sections.title: Information Accuracy
sections.content: While we make reasonable efforts to ensure the accuracy of property information, pricing, layouts, approvals, and availability:
items: All property details are subject to change by developers, sellers, or authorities without prior notice
Visuals, brochures, and representations are indicative in nature
Final decisions should be made after independent verification and due diligence

sections.title: Third-Party Associations
sections.content: We may work with developers, channel partners, banks, legal professionals, and service providers. Zar Venture Real Estate is not responsible for:
items: Actions, omissions, or services provided by third parties
Delays caused due to banks, government authorities, or developers
Changes in regulations or policies affecting transactions

sections.title: No Guarantee of Returns
sections.content: Any information related to rental yield, appreciation, or investment returns is indicative and market-based. We do not guarantee:
items: Fixed returns
Capital appreciation
Rental income
sections.additionalContent: Real estate investments are subject to market risks.

sections.title: Client Responsibilities
items: Provide accurate and complete documentation
Comply with applicable laws including FEMA, RBI (LRS), Income Tax, RERA, and UAE regulations
Seek independent legal, tax, and financial advice where required

sections.title: Fees and Payments
items: Service fees, brokerage, or consultancy charges (if applicable) will be communicated separately
Payments must be made as per agreed terms
Government charges, taxes, stamp duty, registration fees, and developer charges are payable directly by the client

sections.title: Intellectual Property
sections.content: All content on this website, including text, logos, images, layouts, and branding, is the intellectual property of Zar Venture Real Estate and may not be copied, reproduced, or used without prior written consent.

sections.title: Limitation of Liability
sections.content: To the maximum extent permitted by law, Zar Venture Real Estate shall not be liable for:
items: Any direct, indirect, incidental, or consequential losses
Loss arising from reliance on website information
Delays, cancellations, or regulatory changes beyond our control

sections.title: Termination of Services
sections.content: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate services if:
items: False or misleading information is provided
There is misuse of the website or services
Legal or regulatory compliance is violated

sections.title: Governing Law and Jurisdiction
sections.content: These Terms & Conditions shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of India. Courts located in India shall have exclusive jurisdiction, unless otherwise agreed in writing.

sections.title: Changes to Terms
sections.content: We reserve the right to modify these Terms & Conditions at any time. Updated terms will be posted on this page with a revised effective date.
